lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission function as new. The exterior is free of any scratches or dents. The interior is in like-new condition with no visible wear.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and some minor dents. The interior shows significant wear and staining. It is mechanically functional but will likely need maintenance soon.

Calling all visionaries and DIY experts! This car is the ultimate blank canvas for your next big restoration project. While it currently needs significant mechanical and cosmetic work to get back on the road, it offers a fantastic foundation for someone with the skills and passion to bring a classic back to its former glory. If you love a hands-on challenge and want a car with incredible potential, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint retains a strong shine, though you will find some minor stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper. The interior is clean and comfortable, showing only light wear on the driver’s seat and steering wheel. Mechanically, the car is sound, runs smoothly, and has a documented service history. It is a reliable and presentable choice for anyone looking for a quality pre-owned vehicle.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. The engine suffers from a significant oil leak and the transmission exhibits harsh shifting. Externally, the body shows extensive rust perforation, several large dents, and failed clear coat. The interior has heavy wear and some non-functional electronics. It will require substantial mechanical and cosmetic work before it can be considered roadworthy.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a superior balance of performance and long-term value. Representing an exemplary standard of care, the exterior maintains its professional luster while the interior remains refined and well-preserved. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical integrity, this automobile provides a reliable and sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a dream. This car is in really great shape and has plenty of life left in her! It’s super reliable and perfect for anyone looking for a solid, well-cared-for vehicle without the brand-new price tag. I’ve absolutely loved driving it, and I know you will too!

This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain utilizes a mechanical limited-slip differential for precise torque vectoring. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance including VANOS solenoid refreshing and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity. The chassis retains its signature 50/50 weight distribution with a well-sorted suspension geometry that remains communicative and compliant. A robust driver-spec vehicle, it displays minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age but remains mechanically dialed for the discerning enthusiast.
Used sedan. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Maintenance records available.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive condition, offering a reliable and comfortable driving experience. The exterior retains a beautiful finish, showing only the minor, superficial signs of road use that come with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the upholstery is well-preserved, and all electronic features, including the climate control and premium audio system, function perfectly. Mechanically, this car is solid and dependable, having been kept on a strict preventative maintenance schedule. It has recently undergone a full inspection and oil service, ensuring it is road-ready from day one. With smooth handling and a quiet ride, this car represents an excellent balance of value and longevity for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior, the automobile has been subject to a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure continued mechanical integrity. While showing signs of respectful ownership consistent with its history, it offers a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This is a distinguished choice for those seeking reliability without compromise.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a premier balance of sophisticated engineering and proven reliability. This specimen has undergone a rigorous professional assessment to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic consistency. It represents a superior acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a refined automotive experience without the premium of a new showroom model. Meticulously cared for and ready for immediate delivery, this vehicle exemplifies our commitment to quality and enduring value.

Hey there! 🚗 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and weekend trips. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road with a new owner today! If you’re looking for a dependable car that still looks and feels fantastic, this is the one for you. Drop me a message if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and a 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis remains composed thanks to refreshed subframe bushings and reinforced mounting points, addressing common E46 floor pan fatigue. Mechanical maintenance is up to date, including a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul and rod bearing inspection. While the exterior shows minor stone chips consistent with spirited use, the drivetrain exhibits exceptional throttle response and linear power delivery, making it a mechanically sound choice for the discerning purist.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained interior and exterior. Reliable daily driver.

This 2017 Porsche 718 Cayman is a meticulously maintained example of precision German engineering. Finished in a sophisticated Agate Grey Metallic, the bodywork presents beautifully with a deep luster, showing only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. The interior is a focused, premium environment featuring black leather upholstery that remains supple and free of tears or significant wear. Every switch and feature, from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions perfectly. Under the hood, the 2.0L turbocharged engine provides spirited performance, paired with a PDK transmission that offers lightning-fast shifts. The car has a documented service history, having recently undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection and oil service. With a fresh set of performance tires and a clean title, this Cayman is ready to deliver an exhilarating driving experience to its next owner.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist, combining robust mechanical integrity with a refined aesthetic presence. Meticulously serviced and presented in commendable condition, it offers a seamless driving experience underpinned by proven reliability. Every aspect of this motorcar has been vetted to ensure it maintains the high standards of our curated inventory, delivering exceptional value and performance.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic discipline. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure consistent performance and operational reliability. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional value for the discerning buyer.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s still got so much life left in her! It’s been super reliable and is in great shape for its next owner. Whether you’re commuting or heading out for a weekend adventure, this car is ready to roll and feels fantastic on the road. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

Used vehicle in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs and drives well. Inspection passed.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury performance and daily reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though a few minor stone chips on the front bumper reflect its honest highway miles. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary; the premium leather seats are supple and free of tears, showing only light bolstering wear on the driver's side consistent with careful use. All electronic components, from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in strong standing, having followed a strict maintenance schedule with a documented history of recent oil changes and fluid flushes. The engine pulls smoothly and the transmission shifts crisply, while the suspension remains tight and communicative over various road surfaces. It sits on a set of premium tires with approximately 70% tread remaining. This is a well-loved, dependable example ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term value. This meticulously maintained sedan strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use, while the alloy wheels are free of major curb rash. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and well-preserved, featuring a smoke-free cabin and a panoramic sunroof that operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is in strong health; we have strictly followed the factory maintenance schedule, including a recent full synthetic oil change and a comprehensive brake inspection. It handles smoothly on the highway with precise steering and a quiet ride. With a clean title in hand and a detailed service history, this car offers a dependable and high-quality driving experience for its next owner.
